PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-API_CONFIG.title: API Configuration
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SPAWN_SHOCKER_RELIC.tit: Spawn a PiSHock Relic at the start of each run
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SPAWN_SHOCKER_RELIC.hov: Disable this option if you want to play co-op with someone with this mod, but you don't want to use a Pi-Shock.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-USERNAME.title: Username
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-USERNAME.hover.desc: Your username in the Pi-Shock Website.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-A_P_I_KEY.title: API Key
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-A_P_I_KEY.hover.desc: A PiShock API Key. You can generate one in the PiShock website, in your Account settings.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SHOCKER_I_D.title: Shocker ID
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SHOCKER_I_D.hover.desc: The Shocker ID that you want this mod to trigger. You can find it in your Shocker settings. This is NOT a Hub ID.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SHOCKER_CONFIG.title: Shocker Settings
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_INTENSITY.title: Maximum Intensity:
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_INTENSITY.hover.des: The intensity of the vibrations and shocks will never surpass this range.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MIN_INTENSITY.title: Minimum Intensity:
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MIN_INTENSITY.hover.des: The intensity of the vibrations and shocks will never be less than this range.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_DURATION.title: Maximum Duration:
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MAX_DURATION.hover.desc: The lenght of the beeps, vibrations and shocks will never surpass this range.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MIN_DURATION.title: Minimum Duration:
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-MIN_DURATION.hover.desc: The lenght of the beeps, vibrations and shocks will never be less than this range.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-ALWAYS_MAX_POWER.title: Always shock at Maximum power
Shocks will always trigger at your chosen Maximum Intensity and Maximum Duration instead of escalate based on damage taken.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-GAMEPLAY.title: Gameplay Settings
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-DEATH_PENALTY.title: Death Penalty
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-DEATH_PENALTY.hover.des:
Defeat will ALWAYS trigger a shock at max power.
(Being Insulated or disabling/losing your relic will NOT avoid this penalty).
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-HEALING_VIBRATES.title: Positive Feedback
Your Shocker will vibrate when you rest in a campfire or beat the game.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-TRIGGER_SELF_DAMAGE.hov: During combat, your Shocker will also trigger at the end of your turn if you took damage during it.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-ALLOW_PUNISHMENTS.title: Enable Punishment Cards
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-ALLOW_PUNISHMENTS.hover: Allow multiplayer cards used by other players trigger your Shocker.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-DEBUG.title: Debug/Sync
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-SEND_VIBRATION_TEST.hov: Makes the target Shocker vibrate at max power.
